predicates.name: previous_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year immediately precedes the first financial year.

predicates.name: next_financial_year
predicates.description: The second financial year immediately follows the first financial year.

predicates.name: employee_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the employee threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: turnover_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the annual net turnover threshold excluding VAT in the financial year.

predicates.name: balance_sheet_threshold_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds the balance sheet total threshold in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one of the listed criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded
predicates.description: The company does not exceed more than one of the listed criteria in the financial year.

predicates.name: more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_for_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company exceeds more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: not_more_than_one_criterion_exceeded_for_two_consecutive_years
predicates.description: The company does not exceed more than one criterion in this financial year and in the immediately preceding financial year.

predicates.name: is_small_company
predicates.description: The company is legally classified as a small company for the financial year.

predicates.name: loses_small_company_status_from
predicates.description: The company loses small-company status from the financial year.

predicates.name: gains_small_company_status_from
predicates.description: The company gains small-company status from the financial year.

functions.name: annual_average_employees
functions.description: The annual average number of employees of the company in the financial year.

functions.name: annual_net_turnover_excluding_vat
functions.description: The annual net turnover of the company excluding value added tax in the financial year.

functions.name: balance_sheet_total
functions.description: The balance sheet total of the company in the financial year.
